ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device from which the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "accX" INTEGER /* X-axis acceleration value */,
  "accY" INTEGER /* Y-axis acceleration value */,
  "accZ" INTEGER /* Z-axis acceleration value */,
  "gyrX" INTEGER /* X-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gyrY" INTEGER /* Y-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gyrZ" INTEGER /* Z-axis gyroscope value */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data collection (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application for which the data was collected */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of the sensor data */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the device (if applicable) */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature at the time of data collection (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES data_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the device is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "battery_capacity" INTEGER /* Battery capacity of the device (if applicable) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "sensor_count" INTEGER /* Number of sensors in the device */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* List of sensor types supported by the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the data status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the device */,
  "sensor_calibrated" INTEGER /* Whether the sensor is calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record with the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly (e.g., spike, drop) */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "detected_on" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  "resolved_on" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_anomalies_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record being validated */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule applied (e.g., range check, consistency check) */,
  "validation_result" INTEGER /* Result of the validation (true or false) */,
  "validated_on" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or system that performed the validation */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_maintenance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
